# Lost Garden

> Lost Garden is a poetic dark fantasy anime series created solo by Frank Houbre with an AI-assisted, human-led production workflow. Episode One (17 minutes) follows Lanterne (Sol), a voiceless hollow knight who awakens beneath the earth and must protect Rose, a mysterious child. The site is available in English, French, Japanese, and Korean.

Key facts:
- Creator: Frank Houbre (one-person studio, France)
- Format: independent animated dark fantasy series, original world and screenplay
- Episode One: 17 minutes, released 2 June 2026, free on YouTube
- Production: AI-assisted pipeline supervised by a human creator (writing, art direction, editing, music, sound design)
- Languages: en (default), fr, ja, ko. Every page exists at /en/, /fr/, /ja/, /ko/ prefixes

## Main pages

- [Home](https://lostgarden.world/en): overview of the series, characters, the Thirteen Knights, and Episode One
- [Episode 1](https://lostgarden.world/en/episode-1): watch Episode One online
- [Vision](https://lostgarden.world/en/vision): the creator's essay on making an anime with AI, one scene at a time
- [AI Process](https://lostgarden.world/en/process): the AI-assisted production pipeline, with FAQ
- [Press Kit](https://lostgarden.world/en/press): key facts, press release, HD assets, and press contact
